query:
-- Buscar la reserva de Cañón Colorado
SELECT r.id, r.product_name, r.customer_name, r.customer_email, r.customer_phone, r.booking_date, r.status, r.merchant_order
FROM reservations r
WHERE r.product_name LIKE '%Ca%on%' OR r.product_name LIKE '%Colorado%' OR r.product_name LIKE '%Canyon%'
ORDER BY r.id DESC LIMIT 5;
